title: mods for lucky block race
body:
# **Lucky Block Race Modpack**
# 
Are you ready to test your luck and race to victory? The **Lucky Block Race Modpack** brings an exciting and unpredictable challenge to Minecraft, where players must survive and reach the finish line while breaking **lucky blocks** along the way. Will fortune be on your side, or will you face chaotic surprises? There's only one way to find out!

## **Features & Enhancements**
## 
This modpack enhances the lucky block race experience with a selection of performance, utility, and quality-of-life mods, including:

✅ **Lucky Blocks (Fabric)** – The core of the challenge! Open blocks to reveal random outcomes, from powerful gear to deadly traps.


✅ **Bridging Mod** – Improve movement and placement efficiency while racing.


✅ Simple Voice Chat – Communicate with friends and foes in real-time.


✅ **Xaero’s Minimap** – Never lose your way in the race!


✅ **Litematica & Printer** – For easier builds and modifications if needed.


✅ **Sodium & Iris Shaders** – Optimized performance and enhanced visuals.


✅ **Gamma Utils (Fullbright)** – See clearly, even in the darkest moments.


...and more!

## **The Race Map**
##
This modpack is designed for the **Lucky Block Race with Checkpoints** map, available here:
🔗 https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/worlds/luckyblock-race-with-checkpoints

Each lane in the race has **five checkpoints** , ensuring a structured and fair challenge. Here’s a breakdown of checkpoint coordinates:

## **Lane Checkpoints**
##
🏁 **Lane 1:** (372, 103, 1426) → (322, 26, 1724)


🏁 **Lane 2:** (361, 103, 1426) → (361, 26, 1724)


🏁 **Lane 3:** (350, 103, 1426) → (350, 26, 1724)


🏁 **Lane 4:** (339, 103, 1426) → (339, 26, 1724)


🏁 **Lane 5:** (383, 103, 1426) → (381, 26, 1724)


🏁 **Lane 6:** (394, 103, 1426) → (390, 26, 1724)

## **Why Download This Modpack?**
##
🔥 **Fast-Paced Fun** – Race against friends in a thrilling game of skill and luck.


🎲 **Unpredictable Chaos** – No two races are ever the same with the lucky blocks!


🚀 **Optimized Performance** – Mods like Sodium and Iris ensure smooth gameplay.


🎙 **Multiplayer Ready** – Voice chat and performance mods enhance the experience with friends.

May the luck be in your favor—download now and race to victory! 🏆
